scripts.test: npm run build && npm run compile:tests && npm run test:package-layout && node tests/out/runTest.js && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.clean: rimraf client/out server/out shared/out tests/out client/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo server/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo shared/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
scripts.package:vsix: npm run clean && npm run build && node scripts/package-vsix.mjs
